_comment: This is a REFERENCE copy. The live config is at ~/.openclaw/openclaw.json on M4, managed via CLI commands below.

_setup_instructions.2_auth_moonshot: openclaw models auth paste-token   (paste Moonshot API key when prompted)

_env_vars_required.DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN: Set in shell env or launchd plist (not sensitive — bot token, not user token)
_env_vars_required.MOONSHOT_API_KEY: Stored via 'openclaw models auth paste-token' in ~/.openclaw/agents/main/agent/auth-profiles.json

_vikunja_access: Agent uses curl via native bash tool (no MCP). API at http://localhost:3456 via SSH tunnel. Token in ~/.config/axinova/vikunja.env

_version_history.2026-03-02: Initial setup with old JSON config format (providers, agents, channels keys)
_version_history.2026-03-07: Migrated to v2026.3.2 CLI-based config. Old format no longer supported.
